title: Phytophthora capsici CTAB DNA Extraction for High-Molecular Weight DNA
author: Pablo Vargas-Mejía

steps.title: Pre-warm CTAB buffer
steps.instruction: Pre-warm CTAB buffer: Preheat CTAB DNA Extraction Buffer to 55 °C until fully dissolved.

steps.title: Homogenize mycelium (gentle)
steps.instruction: Homogenize mycelium (gentle): Grind Phytophthora mycelium ( Sample ) in a 1.5 mL tube preloaded with 200 µL warm CTAB buffer using a sterile pestle. Once homogeneous, add 500 µL more CTAB buffer (total 700 µL ) and mix gently by inversion or flicking (do not vortex).

steps.title: Lyse
steps.instruction: Lyse: Incubate 00:30:00 at 55 °C with gentle shaking ( 200 rpm, °C, ) in a thermomixer.

steps.title: First chloroform extraction
steps.instruction: First chloroform extraction: In a fume hood, add 500 µL of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1). Mix by inversion for 00:03:00 (do not vortex).

steps.title: Clarify
steps.instruction: Clarify: Centrifuge 00:10:00 at maximum speed (~ 16000 x g, °C, ).

steps.title: Recover aqueous phase
steps.instruction: Recover aqueous phase: Transfer ONLY the upper aqueous phase to a new tube, avoiding the interphase.

steps.title: RNase treatment
steps.instruction: RNase treatment: Add 5 µL RNase A (20 mg/mL). Mix gently and incubate 00:15:00 at 37 °C . Optionally add 5 µL of Proteinase K (20 mg/mL).

steps.title: Second chloroform extraction
steps.instruction: Second chloroform extraction: Add 500 µL of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1). Mix by slow inversion 00:03:00 (no vortex).

steps.title: Clarify (2)
steps.instruction: Clarify (2): Centrifuge 00:10:00 at maximum speed (~ 16000 x g, °C, ).

steps.title: Transfer again
steps.instruction: Transfer again: Transfer the upper aqueous phase to a NEW tube, avoiding any interphase.

steps.title: Precipitate DNA (salt + ethanol)
steps.instruction: Precipitate DNA (salt + ethanol): Add 0.1 volume of 3 M sodium acetate pH 5.2 (e.g., 50 µL per 500 µL aqueous). Mix by inversion. Then add 500-1000 µL of ice-cold 100% ethanol and invert gently until mixed.

steps.title: Cold incubation
steps.instruction: Cold incubation: Precipitate at 80 °C for 30- 00:45:00 (or at 20 °C for 60 min).

steps.title: Pellet DNA
steps.instruction: Pellet DNA: Centrifuge 00:15:00 at maximum speed. Note pellet location by orienting tube hinges outward.

steps.title: Wash pellet (70% ethanol)
steps.instruction: Wash pellet (70% ethanol): Remove supernatant carefully. Add 500 µL ice-cold 70% ethanol, invert once or twice, and centrifuge 00:05:00 at maximum speed.

steps.title: Repeat wash
steps.instruction: Repeat wash: Repeat the 70% ethanol wash once more.

steps.title: Dry
steps.instruction: Dry: Remove all ethanol with a fine tip. Air-dry 10– 00:15:00 until ethanol odor is gone; do not overdry.

steps.title: Resuspend
steps.instruction: Resuspend: Resuspend DNA in 50 µL TE buffer ( 37 °C recommended) or nuclease-free water. Dissolve at 4 °C for several hours or overnight with occasional gentle tapping.

steps.title: Quantify and QC
steps.instruction: Quantify and QC: Use NanoDrop primarily for purity ratios (A260/280, A260/230). Run a 0.4% agarose gel overnight.
